title: Bundle UI Panel (Frequently Bought Together, individual scores)
description: Build the Bundle UI Panel in the Scout Result panel or as a collapsible section below it. Displays: 'Smart Bundles' heading, up to 3 suggested complementary items from the Ethical Bundle Optimizer (P2.4), each with thumbnail (from cached product data), True Value + Personal Fit mini-scores, and the rationale string. 'Why this?' tooltip for each item. No add-to-cart auto-action — suggestions are informational only. Consistent with Scout Result Panel design tokens (P1.10). TDD for bundle item rendering and score display.
